name: Paytm
description: India's leading digital payments platform with UPI, wallet, bill payments, investments, and merchant services for 330M+ users
pros: Now 100% Indian-owned — Ant Financial fully exited Aug 2025
Comprehensive financial services: payments, insurance, lending, investments
Largest offline merchant payment network in India (Paytm Soundbox)
Wide acceptance across small shops, restaurants, and auto-rickshaws
cons: RBI restrictions on Paytm Payments Bank (Feb 2024) caused service disruption
App has become bloated with too many features and ads
Investment/lending products can have hidden terms
Revenue still under pressure post-RBI action
userComplaints: Cashback offers have reduced significantly compared to early days
Too many notifications and promotional spam
KYC verification process can be frustrating and repetitive
